How To Read This Weapon

Damage typeCorrosive
Per hit2328
Shot total2328per hit x hit count
Approx. DPS759shot total + DoT / reload
Heat per sec57
Hits per shot1
TagsDoT, Shield leech, Multi-hit, Charge, projectile
  • Hold fire to charge the beam
  • Range and damage increases by charge time
  • Reduces target armor
  • Can NOT be copied at the Pirate Bay

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase damage by 25%.Noxium Beam lvl 1Steel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 25%. Reduce power consumption by 10%.Noxium Beam lvl 1Steel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 25%. Increase maximum range by 20%. Noxium Beam lvl 1Steel x1600n/a
4Increase damage by 35%. Increase range by 10%.Noxium Beam lvl 1Steel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x400
5Increase damage by 37%. Reduce power consumption by 20%.Noxium Beam lvl 1Steel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase damage by 62%. Increase number of projectiles by 2.Noxium Beam lvl 1Steel x12800Iridium x800
